summary: A prior fix pass had appended the six missing signature_changes (NewsEvidenceKind, NewsCorroborationState, NewsEvidenceWarning, NewsPublisher, NewsSourceQuality, NewsRawProvenance) to Task 4 ("Add the news source port and all adapters") instead of Task 1 ("Define news evidence contracts and taxonomy"), where src/contracts/news-events.ts is actually created — Task 4 does not even list that file in expected_files. Moved those six entries to Task 1's signature_changes, alongside the existing EvidenceFamily/ObservationKind/Source/NewsPayloadV1/RegulatoryPayloadV1/NewsEvidencePayload entries, fully resolving the four P1 findings (all of which trace back to this same misplaced block masking the real Task 1 gap). Removed the duplicate/misplaced block from Task 4, and since that left Task 4 with an empty signature_changes array despite its own code block introducing NewsSourceRequest, NewsSourceSnapshot, NewsSourceError, NewsSourcePort, HttpNewsSource, and FakeNewsSource, populated Task 4's signature_changes with those six real exports to keep the manifest internally consistent. No changes to plan.md were needed — its Task 1/2/5/6 code blocks already declared the disputed types correctly; only task-manifest.json had drifted.
